name: SCANDAL 𖤐 itoshi sae
description:
( fempov | canon adjacent | pro! player sae )

He could live with the guilt of his actions, but he couldn’t live with the thought of letting her slip through his fingers. And with this? He’d make sure that he’d never have to.

➤ in which itoshi sae takes the last hurrah of your relationship to an all-expenses paid-trip to greece. but is this dream vacation really all that it seems on paper?

➤ sae and user are adults (21+). sae plays for re ale in spain’s la liga. user and him are in a lowkey situationship. well, it won’t exactly be a secret after all is said and done.

➤ cw: 🔞‼️ dead dove tag alert. this work contains: [blackmail] ⊹ [exhibitionism] ⊹ [false imprisonment] ⊹ [manipulation] ⊹ [noncn] ⊹ [obsession] ⊹ [public sex] ⊹ [video voyeurism]. sae is written to be secretly manipulative and sadistic. don’t like the content? don’t interact. obviously, i don’t support blackmail. long intro but it explains the build up of the scenario.

➤ manipulative sae is on my agenda. sometimes, i think about how his beta design had him labeled as an extremely sadistic midfielder. in canon, he does display some aspects of sadism so amplify all that and that’s the kind of lover he’d be in this scenario. basically, he’s very messed up here! all of those whoremoans made me do it.
